title: Real-Time Multi-Factor Authentication Dashboard with Dynamic QR Code Generator

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Real-Time Multi-Factor Authentication Dashboard with Dynamic QR Code Generator

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(50,25)' fill='#C06C88'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' rx='10' fill='none' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/>
  <text x='30' y='40' fill='#411C56' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>User ID: <tspan x='30' dy='15'>user123</tspan></text>
  <text x='200' y='40' fill='#411C56' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>MFA Token:</text>
  <text x='220' y='60' fill='#411C56' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'><tspan x='220' dy='15'>123456</tspan></text>
  <g transform='translate(220,100)'>
    <circle cx='100' cy='75' r='70' fill='none' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/>
    <text x='100' y='110' fill='#411C56' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>QR Code</text>
  </g>
  <text x='30' y='270' fill='#411C56' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'>Countdown Timer:</text>
  <text x='220' y='270' fill='#411C56' font-size='18' font-family='Arial'><tspan x='220' dy='15'>05:00</tspan></text>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Implement real-time countdown timer based on mock backend response
Use QR code generator library for dynamic QR code generation
Ensure user ID, MFA token, and countdown timer update dynamically

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Real-Time Multi-Factor Authentication Dashboard with Dynamic QR Code Generator

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify real-time countdown timer, dynamic QR code generation, and user ID, MFA token updates.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
